### Printing License Agreements

Before installing a new server, it may be useful to review the license agreements that will need to be accepted during installation. The `print-licenses` command allows users to preview these agreements without performing the actual installation.

#### Usage

The `print-licenses` command accepts the same parameters as the `install` command, but instead of installing the server, it displays the license agreements that would be required.

[source, bash]
----
$ ./prospero.sh print-licenses \
      --profile wildfly \
      --manifest /path/to/wildfly-manifest.yaml \
      --repositories https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/
----

This command will output all licenses that need to be accepted, along with their full text.

#### Using with custom feature packs

When planning to install a server with custom feature packs or provisioning configurations, the `print-licenses` command can be used to preview all licenses across all components:

[source, bash]
----
$ ./prospero.sh print-licenses \
      --definition provisioning.xml \
      --manifest /path/to/wildfly-manifest.yaml \
      --repositories https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/
----

#### Accepting licenses during installation

During actual installation, licenses can be accepted interactively when prompted, or automatically accepted using the `--accept-license-agreements` flag:

[source, bash]
----
$ ./prospero.sh install \
      --dir wfly-31 \
      --profile wildfly \
      --manifest /path/to/wildfly-manifest.yaml \
      --accept-license-agreements
----

NOTE: The `--accept-license-agreements` flag should only be used when you have reviewed and agreed to all applicable licenses, such as by using the `print-licenses` command beforehand.
